nasb.text: Jesus came out from the temple and was going away when His disciples came up to point out the temple buildings to Him.

esv.text: Jesus left the temple and was going away, when his disciples came to point out to him the buildings of the temple.

cnv.text: 耶穌出了聖殿，往前走的時候，門徒前來把聖殿的建築指給他看。

ccb.text: 耶稣离开圣殿时，门徒上前把宏伟的圣殿指给祂看。

csbs.text: 耶稣从圣殿出来，往前走的时候，他的门徒们上前来，把圣殿的建筑指给他看。
